citations.claim: The component reads attestation data from a fixed file path and handles read errors
Uses attestation.VerifyJSON() to parse and verify the attestation blob
Displays hardware information extracted from the attestation
Shows cross-language verification success message and exits with appropriate code
The attestation package provides P-256 ECDSA signature verification with cross-language JSON compatibility
VerifyJSON function provides the main entry point for attestation verification from raw JSON
AttestationBlob struct contains hardware identity and security state fields in alphabetical order
VerificationResult struct provides structured output for verification results
Verify function implements P-256 ECDSA signature verification with security policy checks
Security policy enforcement requires Secure Enclave, SIP, and Secure Boot to be enabled
ParseP256PublicKey handles both 64-byte and 65-byte uncompressed point formats
marshalSortedJSON provides cross-language JSON compatibility with Swift's sorted key encoding
Component is part of the coordinator Go module using Go 1.25.0
Uses golang.org/x/crypto for extended cryptographic operations
